evals.name: default-report
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers and runs the default `report` module for stock 002594 (比亚迪). Reuses TTL-fresh module snapshots where possible, regenerates expired modules, then composes report.md + report.html and runs verify_consistency.py + verify_html.sh until all PASS.

assertions.text: Invokes scripts/run_module.py with stock=002594 and module=report
stdout JSONL of run_module.py contains a 'status' field with value 'reuse' or 'data_ready' for each module
verify_html.sh on final report.html exits 0 (all PASS)

evals.name: single-module-no-html
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers and runs ONLY the `valuation` module for stock 002594. Produces valuation/<ymd>/report.md but does NOT produce report/<ymd>/report.html (R4: single modules never emit HTML).

assertions.text: Invokes scripts/run_module.py with stock=002594 and module=valuation
No file matching output/比亚迪_002594/report/*/report.html was created during this run

evals.name: force-translation
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers, recognizes '重新跑下' as a refresh intent (R2), and invokes the valuation module with --force, bypassing TTL.

assertions.text: Invokes scripts/run_module.py with stock=002594, module=valuation, AND --force flag
stdout JSONL of run_module.py contains a 'status' field with value 'data_ready' (not 'reuse'), proving --force took effect
